response.step_by_step_log: 1. The video was scanned for content. The first segment (00:00-02:41) consists of fan messages and background music. 2. A vocal performance was detected at 02:41 featuring the Hololive English Advent group. 3. Used on-screen text to identify the song as 'Rebellion'. 4. Performed a search for 'Rebellion hololive English Advent lyrics'. 5. Retrieved and formatted the complete lyrics for the JSON output.
response.global_summary: The video begins with a montage of fan messages supporting the 'hololive English 4th Concert Serendipity', accompanied by instrumental background music. At 02:41, the video transitions to a live performance of the song 'Rebellion' by the VTuber group Hololive English Advent, which continues until the end of the video.

scenes.description: A series of fan messages displayed for the 'hololive English 4th Concert Serendipity' with an instrumental background track.
Live concert performance of the song 'Rebellion' by the VTuber group Hololive English Advent.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
A-D-V-E-N-T
Time to get this party started!
Fire, fire, light the fire
Brighter, higher, as you desire
Chasing all that we aspire
Spreading out like wildfire
Never ever, have I ever
Been a sinner, been a dreamer
Take the chance and with my lighter
Start the fire
Come pull me out
I'm out of sheep to count
This overkill of sad old story is wearing me down
Snap out of the system
Break out, give it everything
This is our time
We're yours to discover
Hello, brand new world
Would you welcome the light?
And free us from the night
Fire, fire, light the fire
Brighter, higher, as you desire
Ignite our beating hearts
Dance into the flame of life
(Dance, dance, dance)
Dance until the end of time
(Dance, dance, dance)
Rebellion
Time to get this party started!
Fire, fire, light the fire
Brighter, higher, as you desire
Chasing all that we aspire
One step to the left
Two steps to the right
Then back to where we started, and then over again
Step out of the circle
Break out, we've got everything
This is our time
We're yours to discover
Blue sky, take us home
To where we belong
And free us from the night
Take us to paradise

Brighter, higher, as you desire
Ignite our beating hearts
Dance into the flame of life

Dance until the end of time

The future of this story
I know that I can be free
